scripts.verify: pnpm verify:governance && pnpm verify:public && pnpm verify:rust && make -C runtime/core test && make -C runtime/core wasm-test && pnpm verify:web && pnpm verify:skill
scripts.verify:hd-identity: node --test scripts/accept-private-hd-review.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/hd-identity-map.test.ts src/quality-leap-audit.test.ts src/hd-review-packet.test.ts src/hd-review-decision.test.ts src/hd-evidence-lifecycle.test.ts
scripts.verify:batch: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/batch.test.ts src/batch-job.test.ts
scripts.verify:supervised-transfer: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/human-stop-request.test.ts src/human-stop-request-job.test.ts src/host-authority.test.ts src/supervised-review-proposal.test.ts src/supervised-transfer.test.ts src/supervised-transfer-job.test.ts src/transfer-findings.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aico8/human-authority-host test
scripts.verify:game-module: pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/game-module.test.ts src/assembly.test.ts src/assembly-job.test.ts
scripts.verify:qualification-plan: node --test scripts/build-private-qualification-plan.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aico8/contracts exec vitest run src/qualification-plan.test.ts
scripts.verify:web: node --test apps/web/service-worker.test.mjs scripts/lib/canonical-gameplay-attestation.test.mjs scripts/lib/capture-readiness-evidence.test.mjs scripts/lib/hd-surface-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/input-trace-provenance.test.mjs scripts/lib/package-path.test.mjs scripts/lib/qualification-boundary.test.mjs scripts/lib/release-identities.test.mjs scripts/lib/review-screenshot.test.mjs scripts/lib/semantic-svg.test.mjs scripts/lib/source-contour-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/source-visual-structure-lineage.test.mjs scripts/lib/viewport-evidence.test.mjs && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
